name: human-approval
description: Gate real-world actions behind human confirmation. The agent describes what it wants to do, the human approves or rejects, and the agent proceeds accordingly. Consumers describe the action — Claude routes to the appropriate provider tool based on grants.

behavior.input: An action description, optional context, and optional timeout
behavior.output: Approval status (approved/rejected/timeout) with any human comments
behavior.deterministic: Request must be recorded or return explicit failure. Approval may time out.
